# Schedley - AI-Powered B2B Lead Generation Platform

## About Schedley
Schedley is an enterprise-grade B2B lead generation and intelligent scheduling platform
that combines AI technology with human expertise to deliver qualified leads and prevent
spam bookings. Used by 300+ B2B sales teams and agencies to scale revenue.

## Core Value Proposition
- **99.7% Email Validation Accuracy:** AI + human verification ensures every lead is legitimate
- **126,000+ Hours Saved:** Customers report massive time savings from automation
- **98.5% Lead Quality Score:** Only qualified, high-intent prospects reach your calendar
- **7,620+ Spam Requests Blocked:** Enterprise-grade fraud detection
- **1,380+ Leads Generated:** Verified through customer outcomes
- **4.9/5 Customer Satisfaction:** 50+ detailed reviews from verified users

## Product Overview
### Lead Generation
- Intelligent outreach targeting high-ticket clients
- AI-powered prospecting with human qualification
- 100% refund guarantee if no qualified client booked in 7 days

### Email Intelligence
- Real-time email validation at scale (99.7% accuracy)
- Spam detection and blocking before meetings are booked
- Company verification and domain validation

### Calendar Control
- Block fake bookings automatically
- Only qualified leads reach your calendar
- Integrates with existing scheduling tools

### Hiring Infrastructure
- SDR and sales coordinator recruiting
- Revenue team talent acquisition
- Industry-specific training

## Key Features
1. **AI Email Filtering:** Validates email addresses in real-time
2. **Lead Qualification:** Human + AI hybrid scoring system
3. **Calendar Integration:** Prevents spam from reaching your schedule
4. **Performance Tracking:** Dashboard showing blocked spam vs. qualified leads
5. **API Access:** Technical integration for enterprise customers
6. **Support:** Dedicated support team for enterprise clients

- **Founded:** 2023
- **Headquarters:** United States
- **Customer Base:** 300+ B2B companies globally
- **Industry:** SaaS - Sales Enablement & Lead Generation
- **Website:** https://www.schedley.com

## Technical Information
- **Type:** Cloud-based SaaS application
- **Hosting:** Vercel (Enterprise CDN)
- **Availability:** 99.9% uptime SLA
- **Security:** SOC 2 Type II compliant (if applicable)
- **Data Privacy:** GDPR compliant, privacy policy available at https://www.schedley.com/privacy

## Use Cases
1. **Enterprise Sales Teams:** Scaling qualified pipeline without hiring chaos
2. **Agencies:** Managing multiple client calendars with fraud protection
3. **Startups:** Building credible outreach with minimal overhead
4. **SDR Teams:** Qualifying leads before human follow-up
5. **RevOps:** Automating lead routing and validation
